memoryArtifacts.headline: FOWLER FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
memoryArtifacts.description:
FOWLER FAMILY

March 20,  2020
February 14, 2018


 
 
FOWLER FAMILY
GENERATIONS

More before 1400. I stopped at 1400 (Merle Romer.)
	
1. Sir William Fowler of Foxley 1400-1452
1.a. Cecelia Englefiel …

Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Fowler, Fouler, Fowlers, Fouler, Fowlar, Folar, Fouller, Fowlare, Foweller, Fowaller, Foulier, Foullar, Foular and many more. First found in Norfolk where they were seated from very ancient times, some say well before the Norman Conquest and the arrival of Duke William at Hastings in 1066 C.E. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: John Fowler who settled in Virginia in 1622; just two years after the arrival of the "Mayflower." He was followed soon after by settlers of the name in Barbados, Massachusetts, Maryland, and Rhode Island. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009). Motto Translated: He is wise who watches. This interesting surname is of Anglo-Saxon origin, and is from an occupational name for a bird-catcher or hunter of wild birds. In the medieval period a fowler would have been an important position, and all major houses would have employed one. The derivation is from the Old English pre-7th Century "fugelere", hunter of wild birds. Job-descriptive surnames originally denoted the actual occupation of the name bearer, and later became hereditary. There are several name bearers listed in the "Dictionary of National Biography", many being men of the church, the others tending towards innovation, such as John Fowler (1826 - 1864), who invented the steam plow, in 1858 he received a prize from the Royal Agricultural Society for his steam cultivator, and William Fowler (1761 - 1832), an artist, who was said to have introduced lead lines in representing colored glass. The name reached the New World in the early 17th Century, when it is recorded that one George Fowler, aged 22 yrs., sailed aboard the "Primrose" in July 1635, bound for Virginia. The first recorded spelling of the family name is shown to be that of Richard Fugelere, which was dated 1218, witness in the "Assize Court Rolls of Lancashire", during the reign of King Henry 2nd, known as "The Frenchman", 1216 - 1272. Surnames became necessary when governments introduced personal taxation. In England this was known as Poll Tax. Throughout the centuries, surnames in every country have continued to "develop" often leading to astonishing variants of the original spelling.  Copyright: Name Origin Research www.surnamedb.com 1980 - 2014.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Fowler於1445年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾利可特時，他的父親Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House45歲，母親Cecilia de Englefield41歲。他和Margaret Colwick至少有8個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1515年7月2日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Fowler was born in 1445, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, was 45 and his mother, Cecilia de Englefield, was 41. He had at least 8 sons and 2 daughters with Margaret Colwick. He died on 2 July 1515, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Fowler est né en 1445, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Cecilia d’Englefield, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Colwick. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1515, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Fowler 1445 in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House 45 und seine Mutter Cecilia de Englefield 41. Er hatte mit Margaret Colwick mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juli 1515 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Fowler è nato il nel 1445 nel Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia de Englefield, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie con Margaret Colwick. Morì il 2 luglio 1515, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Fowlerが1445年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトで生まれた時，父Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle Houseは45歳，母Cecilia de Englefieldは41歳であった。彼はMargaret Colwickとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1515年7月2日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Fowler(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia de Englefield(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Margaret Colwick(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1515년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Fowler nasceu em 1445, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia de Englefield, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas com Margaret Colwick. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1515, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Fowler родился в 1445 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia de Englefield, 41. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери от Margaret Colwick. Он умер 2 июля 1515 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Fowler nació en 1445, en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Cecilia de Englefield, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas con Margaret Colwick. Murió el 2 de julio de 1515, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
